records.question: Which parties have addresses located exactly in Colorado?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id FROM parties
JOIN party_addresses ON parties.party_id = party_addresses.party_id
JOIN addresses ON party_addresses.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE addresses.state_province_county = 'Colorado'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.party_id
FROM Parties p
JOIN Party_Addresses pa ON p.party_id = pa.party_id
JOIN Addresses a ON pa.address_id = a.address_id
WHERE a.state_province_county = 'Colorado'

records.question: Who are the parties with the email alanna.boehm@example.net and phone 529-074-5348 that use Cheque as their payment method and have a Residence address valid since at least 2016-05-24 08:11:04 and ending exactly on 2018-03-04 08:34:45?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id FROM parties
JOIN party_addresses ON parties.party_id = party_addresses.party_id
WHERE party_addresses.date_address_from >= '2016-05-24 08:11:04' AND parties.party_email = 'alanna.boehm@example.net' AND party_addresses.address_type_code = 'Residence' AND party_addresses.date_address_to = '2018-03-04 08:34:45' AND parties.payment_method_code = 'Cheque' AND parties.party_phone = '529-074-5348'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.party_id
FROM Parties p
JOIN Party_Addresses pa ON p.party_id = pa.party_id
WHERE p.party_email = 'alanna.boehm@example.net'
  AND p.party_phone = '529-074-5348'
  AND p.payment_method_code = 'Cheque'
  AND pa.address_type_code = 'Residence'
  AND pa.date_address_from <= '2016-05-24 08:11:04'
  AND pa.date_address_to = '2018-03-04 08:34:45'

records.question: Which parties paid by Cheque and made a booking on or after 2018-03-24 22:12:30?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id FROM parties
JOIN party_services ON parties.party_id = party_services.customer_id
JOIN services ON party_services.service_id = services.service_id
WHERE party_services.booking_made_date >= '2018-03-24 22:12:30' AND parties.payment_method_code = 'Cheque'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.party_id
FROM Parties p
INNER JOIN Party_Services ps ON p.party_id = ps.customer_id
WHERE p.payment_method_code = 'Cheque'
AND ps.booking_made_date >= '2018-03-24 22:12:30'

AND ps.booking_made_date <= '2018-03-24 09:20:46'

JOIN Services s ON ps.service_id = s.service_id

JOIN Forms f ON pf.form_id = f.form_id
WHERE p.party_email = 'noe.ziemann@example.org'
AND s.service_name = 'Welfare'

AND f.form_description = 'Form for SSN Application'

records.question: What parties with phone number 529-074-5348 and email alanna.boehm@example.net have received services on or after 2018-03-05 13:02:22 that include the Complex form 9130 described as Form for Property Change?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id FROM parties
JOIN party_services ON parties.party_id = party_services.customer_id
JOIN services ON party_services.service_id = services.service_id
JOIN forms ON services.service_id = forms.service_id
WHERE parties.party_phone = '529-074-5348' AND forms.form_type_code = 'Complex' AND forms.form_number = '9130' AND party_services.service_datetime >= '2018-03-05 13:02:22' AND forms.form_description = 'Form for Property Change' AND parties.party_email = 'alanna.boehm@example.net'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.party_id
FROM Parties p
INNER JOIN Party_Services ps ON p.party_id = ps.customer_id
INNER JOIN Party_Forms pf ON p.party_id = pf.party_id
INNER JOIN Forms f ON pf.form_id = f.form_id
WHERE p.party_phone = '529-074-5348'
AND p.party_email = 'alanna.boehm@example.net'
AND ps.service_datetime >= '2018-03-05 13:02:22'
AND f.form_number = '9130'
AND f.form_name = 'Form for Property Change'
AND f.form_type_code = 'Complex'
